title: Sirippu En Lyrics Anjaan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Sirippu en speciality
Silku smitha community
ah.. ha.. ah.. ha...

Day by day majority
Take it easy mentality
ah.. ha.. ah.. ha..

Hy Paappa pola maturity
Ada pasanga kootam security
En alagukea naa authority
En adimai intha mumbai city

Rainbow rainbow dhegamea
Rest eh illaa vegamea
Yelakail ***** naanada...

Orakannal nambava
Undhan pakkam nirkavaa..
Thalukum azhagal thappava sollada...ah...

Sirippu en speciality
Silku smitha community
ah.. ha.. ah.. ha...

Orthodox uh family strict ah irupomey..
Boys uh ketta mattum thaan
nanga heart eh thirapomea..

Hy.. Yealu ettu varusama
Thanimai kidayathu..
Vazhvil entha neramum
Naan dual sim card uh..
Manasu parakumea kaathodu
Ulagam irukumea youthodu..
Enakku pidikumea koothada..
Ilamai dhegamea poothada..
Munnal vaada speed ah sood ah
aadal seiyaveney....

Rainbow rainbow..
Rainbow rainbow dhegam
Rest eh illaa vegam
Yelakail ***** naanada...

Audi,Humber car elam veetu munnadi..
Kaathirunthu kenjuthey
enna hayyo ammaadi..

Fans-u tholla thangala vaasal munnadi..
heart ah adagu
vaanguven naan modern maarvadi..

Paduthu thoongida five star-u..
Parugum baanamo tin beer-u..
Pidicha aaludun noo.. tour-u..
Lift kiss uh thaan en share-u..
Mumbai Dhadha ellam en munn
Romba saadha da..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Sirippu En conveys a light-hearted and carefree attitude towards life, encouraging listeners to embrace joy and positivity.

How does this song fit into the plot of Anjaan?

The song captures the essence of celebration and camaraderie among friends, reflecting the vibrant spirit of the movie.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the talented Manasi MM, known for her energetic vocal style.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics were penned by Viveka, who is known for his catchy and relatable songwriting.

When was the song released?

Sirippu En was released on August 11, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sirippu En, the lively beats and playful lyrics encapsulate the carefree spirit of youth and friendship. The song serves as a backdrop to moments of joy and celebration in the movie Anjaan, inviting listeners to let loose and enjoy life. It evokes feelings of happiness and camaraderie, making it a perfect addition to any festive playlist. With its upbeat tempo and catchy chorus, this track is sure to uplift anyone's mood.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sirippu En from Anjaan is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, brought to life by the captivating voice of Manasi MM. The song's infectious energy and catchy lyrics make it a perfect anthem for any festive occasion. Dive into the rhythmic beats and let the music uplift your spirits!
stanzaMeanings: My specialty is laughter, belonging to the Silku Smitha community.
Day by day, people have a take-it-easy attitude.
Like a mature person, I have my own authority and security in this Mumbai city.
Rainbow, rainbow, the body is restless, there’s no rest at all.
Can you trust me for a moment? Don’t say anything wrong about my smile.
My specialty is laughter, belonging to the Silku Smitha community.
We come from a strict orthodox family, but we only open our hearts to the boys we like.

Hey, it’s been seven years, I haven’t felt lonely. At any moment in life, I’m like a dual SIM card, my heart is connected to the world and the youth. I like to dance, youth is blooming, I’ll dance with speed.
Rainbow, rainbow, the body is restless, there’s no rest at all.
Audi and Humber cars are parked in front of the house, waiting for me, oh my goodness.
Fans are waiting in front of the entrance, I’ll win their hearts, I’m a modern person.
Singing and sleeping in a five-star place, drinking beer while running, if I like someone, it’s a tour, a lift kiss is my share, everything in Mumbai is very simple.
